basic_details.job_title: ICAR-NBPGR Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: ICAR-National Bureau of Plant Genetic Resources
basic_details.short_information: ICAR-National Bureau of Plant Genetic Resources (ICAR-NBPGR) Project Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website nbpgr.icar.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICAR-NBPGR Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Relaxation in upper age limit to women (5 years), SC/ST (5 years), OBC (3 years), PwD (10 years) as per GOI/ICAR rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences or bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology with specialization in Plant Breeding/ Genetics / Physiology/ Biotechnology
qualification.details: Master's Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences or bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology with specialization in Plant Breeding/ Genetics / Physiology/ Biotechnology. Desirable: Knowledge of wheat genomics, marker-assisted analysis and NGS analysis. Experience in CRISPR/ Cas9 based genome editing.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.31000+27% HRA to Scholars selected through CSIR-UGC NET or GATE for first 2 years and Rs.35000+27% HRA for 3rd year onward; Rs.25000+27% HRA for others
salary_details.details: Rs.31000+27% HRA to Scholars selected through CSIR-UGC NET or GATE for first 2 years and Rs.35000+27% HRA for 3rd year onward; Rs.25000+27% HRA for others.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICAR-NBPGR Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 21st June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Master's Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences or a bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology with specialization in Plant Breeding/ Genetics/ Physiology/ Biotechnology.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-I post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for certain categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How will the candidates be selected for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial application screening followed by a virtual interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The salary varies based on selection through CSIR-UGC NET or GATE. Scholars selected through these means will receive Rs.31000+27% HRA for the first two years and Rs.35000+27% HRA thereafter. Others will receive Rs.25000+27% HRA.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for the ICAR-NBPGR Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is to be done via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The position of Project Associate-I is on a contractual basis. The project is expected to terminate on 31st March 2029.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any desirable qualifications for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Yes, desirable qualifications include knowledge of wheat genomics, marker-assisted analysis, NGS analysis, and experience in CRISPR/Cas9 based genome editing.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the ICAR-National Bureau of Plant Genetic Resources located?
faq.answer: ICAR-National Bureau of Plant Genetic Resources is located in New Delhi, Delhi.
